wk Wikiwiki Wikiwiki

Records

Concepts7 Decisions6 Devlog9 Notes3 Symbols7 Links2

Generated Wikiwiki site

Symbols

Important code symbols and where maintainers should look first.

Symbol

7 records

Symbol high

activeRecords

Filters raw record revisions down to latest non-deleted records for status, rendering, search, and record reads.

symbol_9ee0c0cc-6687-47cd-8a48-b95d7e706652
Symbol high

readWikiwikiConfig

Reads optional .wikiwiki/config.json settings such as source_base_url for generated site source links.

symbol_ed971cd3-7469-4ea8-b928-1865d875fc1c
Symbol high

registerRecordCommand

Registers generic record list, get, update, and delete commands for append-only record lifecycle management.

symbol_3ff0b577-f648-4c44-a713-bd3c4bb57e98
Symbol high

registerSearchCommand

Registers local search across active records and rendered Markdown wiki pages.

symbol_fa848524-5a78-4fc0-9781-cf7673acae13
Symbol high

registerSiteCommand

Registers wk site, which generates the human-facing static Wikiwiki frontend into wiki-site/.

symbol_766a4f0e-54ee-44cc-a9f3-62faac669612
Symbol high

renderSite

Builds and writes the generated wiki-site/ static HTML frontend from active Wikiwiki records.

symbol_a4be37e1-62ce-45b4-a7bf-0735943a0959
Symbol high

resolveSiteOptions

Resolves wk site options by combining .wikiwiki/config.json with CLI overrides, including sourceBaseUrl.

symbol_dfd8c0d0-170a-4a61-bf39-2ab1335c1ba5
